mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRIES I JOIN MEMBER M ON I.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID
WHERE UPPER(I.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
WHERE UPPER(M.NAME) = UPPER(#{keyword})
WHERE UPPER(I.CONTENT) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'

SELECT I.INQUIRIES_ID ,M.NAME AS NAME ,I.TITLE ,I.CONTENT ,I.STATUS ,I.ADMIN_REPLY ,I.IS_PUBLIC ,I.UPDATED_AT ,I.RESOLVED_AT ,I.VIEW_COUNT ,I.IS_FAQ FROM INQUIRIES I JOIN MEMBER M ON I.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY I.IS_FAQ DESC ,I.UPDATED_AT DESC

SELECT I.INQUIRIES_ID ,M.NAME AS NAME ,I.TITLE ,I.CONTENT ,I.STATUS ,I.IS_PUBLIC ,I.UPDATED_AT ,I.RESOLVED_AT ,I.VIEW_COUNT ,I.IS_FAQ FROM INQUIRIES I JOIN MEMBER M ON I.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID
WHERE UPPER(I.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
WHERE UPPER(M.NAME) = UPPER(#{keyword})
WHERE UPPER(I.CONTENT) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
ORDER BY I.IS_FAQ DESC ,I.UPDATED_AT DESC

SELECT I.INQUIRIES_ID ,M.NAME AS NAME ,I.TITLE ,I.CONTENT ,I.STATUS ,I.IS_PUBLIC ,I.UPDATED_AT ,I.RESOLVED_AT ,I.VIEW_COUNT ,I.IS_FAQ FROM INQUIRIES I JOIN MEMBER M ON I.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE I.STATUS = #{status} ORDER BY I.IS_FAQ DESC ,I.UPDATED_AT DESC

SELECT I.INQUIRIES_ID ,I.MEMBER_ID ,M.NAME AS NAME ,I.TITLE ,I.CONTENT ,I.STATUS ,I.ADMIN_REPLY ,I.IS_PUBLIC ,I.UPDATED_AT ,I.RESOLVED_AT ,I.VIEW_COUNT ,I.IS_FAQ FROM INQUIRIES I JOIN MEMBER M ON I.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE I.INQUIRIES_ID = #{inquiriesId}
mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRIES SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, IS_PUBLIC = #{isPublic}, IS_FAQ = #{isFaq}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE INQUIRIES_ID = #{inquiriesId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

UPDATE INQUIRIES SET STATUS = #{status},
RESOLVED_AT = SYSDATE
RESOLVED_AT = NULL
WHERE INQUIRIES_ID = #{inquiriesId}
